productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Boy's Kent Pack of 3 Tee Kidswear
description: CompositionSet of three t-shirts made of 100% cottont-shirt 1: Light grey tee with red ribbed crew neck, red piping around the armholes, football inspired graphic on the chest and navy blue tape on the inseam of the collart-shirt 2: Black and white striped tee with red ribbed collar, red piping around the armholes, grey fabric tape on the inseam of the collar and with embroidered logo initials in red on the left chestT-shirt 3: Red tee with ribbed grey crew neck, with grey piping around the armholes, white fabric tape on the inseam of the collar and with football inspired graphic numbering on the chest FittingRegular98 cm (24-30 months)Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Indulge your little one in the spirit of Sports with these three tees in red, black and grey from gini and jony. Mix and match these with denim shorts and crocs footwear when you take him out next time. The soft cotton fabric will keep him feeling fresh and comfortable all day long.
